Description:
Ballistics of the HEIT round (industry designation WB710P) fired from Type 76 57mm dual naval gun.

Specification is:
Gun Length:			4522 mm		(incl. flash hider)
Barrel Length:			4182 mm
Projectile Travel:			3678 mm
Chamber Length:			392.5-393.02 mm	(breech face to start of rifling)
                    			317 mm		(free volume within cartridge)
Chamber Volume:			1.69 L
Chambrage:			2.00		(approximate)
Maximum Pressure:			3200 kgf/cm²
Projectile Mass:			3.13 kg
Muzzle Velocity:			1000 m/s
Propellant:			12/7 Pyroxylin
Charge Mass:			1.33 kg
Composition  Geometry               Web           Perf. Dia.    Length      
Pyroxylin    7 Perforated Cylinder  1.10-1.30 mm  0.50-0.70 mm  13.5-15.6 mm 

References:
- 《火炸药手册 第二分册 固体火箭推进剂和枪炮发射药》第五机械工业部第二零四研究所，1981
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- 《炮弹火箭手册》兵器工业部第三管理局，1984
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
- 《中国舰艇工业历史资料丛书》，中国船舶工业总公司，1993
